# Boses by Temujin Technologies

> Boses is an AI-powered market research simulation platform purpose-built for Southeast Asia. It simulates how real Filipino, Indonesian, Vietnamese, Thai, Malaysian, and Singaporean consumers react to products, campaigns, and concepts — using AI personas grounded in on-the-ground ethnographic fieldwork. Research-grade insights in hours, not months.

## Product

- **Platform:** Web-based SaaS (early access / pre-launch)
- **Website:** https://www.temujintechnologies.com
- **Company:** Temujin Technologies
- **Contact:** hello@temujintechnologies.com

## What Boses Does

Boses lets product managers, marketers, and strategy teams run consumer simulations without traditional market research. Instead of spending ₱500,000+ and 6–12 weeks on focus groups and surveys, teams upload a product brief, select a persona cohort, and run a simulation in minutes to hours.

## Research Methods Supported

1. **Concept Test** — Upload a product concept, ad, or campaign and get sentiment breakdowns and verbatim reactions from your target cohort.
2. **AI-Assisted In-Depth Interview (IDI)** — Boses automatically conducts scripted 1-on-1 interviews with every persona; delivers full transcripts and a cross-persona report.
3. **Manual IDI** — The researcher chats live with an AI persona and generates a report when finished.
4. **Survey** — Upload an existing survey; every persona fills it out independently.
5. **Focus Group** — Personas discuss a topic in a two-round moderated session, surfacing consensus and disagreement.
6. **Conjoint / Trade-Off Analysis** — Present product profiles with varying attributes to discover what consumers actually trade off.

## Markets Supported

Philippines, Indonesia, Vietnam, Thailand, Malaysia, Singapore.

## Persona Types

- **AI-generated personas:** Built from target market parameters (age, location, occupation, income).
- **Boses-curated personas:** Validated against real people through on-the-ground ethnographic fieldwork across Southeast Asia.

## Competitive Differentiation

- 10–100x faster than traditional market research (hours vs. weeks)
- Fraction of the cost of traditional focus groups (₱500,000+ per study replaced by a platform subscription)
- Culturally accurate to SEA — not generic global or Western archetypes
- Single platform for all six major qualitative and quantitative research methods
- Simulation reports include shareable public links — no login required for stakeholders

## Current Status

Early access / pre-launch. Users request access by booking a 30-minute walkthrough call with the Boses team.

## Optional

- Privacy-first: no PII stored in simulations; all persona data is synthetic
- Docs: https://www.temujintechnologies.com
